description: You are preparing a High-Intensity Interval Training (HIIT) audio mix for a fitness class. Assemble a 50-second workout interval using the audio files in /home/ga/Audio/samples/. The session must include a 'Music' track set to -6 dB and a 'Voice Cues' track set to +3 dB. On the 'Music' track, arrange moonlight_sonata.wav to play from 0.0s to 20.0s and from 30.0s to 50.0s, with a silence gap from 20.0s to 30.0s. On the 'Voice Cues' track, place narration.wav snippets starting at 18.0s and 28.0s. Include session markers named 'Work 1' at 0.0s, 'Rest' at 20.0s, and 'Work 2' at 30.0s. Save the session to /home/ga/Audio/hiit_mix.session.
